# Smith & Peterchev 2018 E-field measurement data

Source: Smith JE, Peterchev AV. Electric Field Measurement of Two Commercial Active/Sham Coils for Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation. Journal of Neural Engineering.

Raw data:
- Smith_Peterchev_2018_Efield_DATA.xls

Documentation:
- Smith_Peterchev_2018_Efield_DATA_README.txt
- Smith_Peterchev_2018_supplementary_material.pdf

Notes:
- Raw spreadsheet contains 1000 measurements on a hemispherical sample grid.
- Coordinates are x, y, z in cm.
- The yz-plane (x = 0) separates the two figure-8 coil loops.
- The inferior coil surface was fixed at approximately z = 8.5 cm.
- Columns contain E-field vector components for Magstim active, Magstim sham, MagVenture active and MagVenture sham.
- Values were measured at 50% maximum stimulator amplitude and are reported in V/m.

Do not edit raw files. Derived empirical-kernel outputs should be generated by code.
